source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A retroreflector is an optical device that can reflect an incident light ray back along its original path. A retroreflector of the Sugden sphere type is made by silvering the rear hemisphere of a transparent spherical medium to create a reflective surface. By selecting an appropriate refractive index $n$, the incident light ray can be reflected back along its original path as shown in figure. Determine the refractive index of the material of the sphere.

image_dependency: question_text explicitly references a figure with the phrase 'as shown in the figure'
multi_step: question_text asks to determine a refractive index from an optical setup involving a transparent sphere and a silvered rear hemisphere
the return-path condition ('reflected back along its original path') suggests combining at least refraction and reflection constraints
the figure is part of the setup description, implying joint text-image reasoning rather than direct lookup
verifiability: answer_text is a single unambiguous value: '2'
multiple-choice options are provided and include '2'

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图片资产均存在，且 registry_passed=true，无明显资产缺口
图像依赖度高且已有对应图片，适合进入候选池
答案为明确数值型，verifiability_score 高，便于验证
multi_step_score 较高，具有较好的题目价值
未见 issues 或 risk_flags，整体风险低
